actionUnits.condition: GameObject platform2 (PrefabInstance fileID 397541581) has BoxCollider id 397541586 with m_IsTrigger=0 and no Rigidbody. Its attached MonoBehaviour (component id 397541585) is AttachToElevator (script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) with field 'player' currently null. This script only reacts to physics callbacks OnTriggerEnter/OnTriggerExit and contains no public methods to call. To cover these callbacks: 1) Set BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger=1 or ensure the other collider is a Trigger, and ensure at least one of the colliders in the interaction has a Rigidbody. 2) Assign MonoBehaviour.player to platform2 itself to exercise the true-branch (note: this will attempt self-parenting: player.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, true)). 3) Move any Rigidbody-bearing collider into and out of platform2's trigger to invoke OnTriggerEnter and then OnTriggerExit. Expected: OnTriggerEnter -> player.transform.SetParent(platform2.transform, true); OnTriggerExit -> player.transform.parent = null. To exercise the false-branch, assign MonoBehaviour.player to any object other than platform2 and repeat the same enter/exit.
